items.title: Emerging-Market Stocks Extend Loss as Oil Jumps on Iran Risks
items.description: Emerging-market stocks extended losses as an escalation in the Middle East conflict added to the ongoing rotation out of AI beneficiaries.

items.title: China Cites Trump Remarks in Rare Criticism of US Taiwan Envoy
items.description: China took the rare step of publicly criticizing the top US diplomat in Taiwan, invoking select remarks by President Donald Trump to argue that the envoy’s actions are destabilizing relations.

items.title: UK Carpet Maker Victoria Signs Deal With Left-Behind Bondholders
items.description: UK carpet maker Victoria Plc and a group of bondholders left behind in an earlier debt deal have struck an agreement over a balance sheet restructuring.

items.title: Nvidia’s $1 Trillion Slide Sends Valuation to Pre-AI Boom Levels
items.description: After losing roughly $1 trillion in market value in less than two months, Nvidia Corp.’s stock is the cheapest it’s been since before the AI boom kicked off and sent the shares into the stratosphere.

items.title: China Allowing Major Exports of Diesel and Gasoline This Month

items.title: Bonds Show Vulnerability to Iran Setback: 3-Minutes MLIV
items.description: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Paul Dobson break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: European Bonds Slide as Oil Spike Reignites Inflation Fears

items.title: Aselsan CEO Says Global Defense Orders Are Surging
items.description: Turkey’s $37 billion state-run defense contractor Aselsan Elektronik Sanayi ve Ticaret AS said international orders have doubled in the past year on the back of demand fueled by the conflicts in Ukrai

items.title: Alphabet Powers 44% Jump in India Foreign Investment, UN Says

items.title: India Fat-Loss Drug Sales Slow After Early Spike From Generics
items.description: Growth in India’s obesity- and diabetes-drug market is losing steam just months after a surge triggered by the arrival of generic semaglutide products.

items.title: Euro Bears Return as Surging Oil Prices Test Currency’s Rebound
items.description: Traders are buying insurance against renewed weakness in the euro as climbing crude oil prices threaten last week’s rebound.

items.title: Ugandan Farmers to Challenge $5.6 Billion Pipeline

items.title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 7/8/2026 (Video)
Private Placements Surge in Middle East on Iran War Volatility
items.description: Private debt placements from the Middle East are surging as volatility due to the Iran war drives borrowers into alternative markets.

items.title: Unite Group Offers Discounted Dorms in Bid to Ramp Up Sales
items.description: The Unite Group Plc has begun offering discounted rents to some students as the landlord looks to boost reservations for the next academic year.
